languages.text: "На тебе живого места нет. Точно не хочешь наведаться к хирургеону?"

traits.locale_text: "На тебе живого места нет. Точно не хочешь наведаться к хирургеону?"

languages.text: "Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Are you sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"
languages.original_text: "На тебе живого места нет. Точно не хочешь наведаться к хирургеону?"

traits.locale_text: "Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"
"Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"
"Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Are you sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"
"Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Are you sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"

languages.text: “瞧你这副模样，全靠唾沫和祈祷硬撑着。你确定不需要找个船医瞧瞧？”
languages.original_text: "Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Are you sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"

traits.locale_text: “瞧你这副模样，全靠唾沫和祈祷硬撑着。你确定不需要找个船医瞧瞧？”

languages.text: "Şu hâline bak, dualarla zar zor ayakta duruyorsun. Cerraha görünmen gerekmediğinden emin misin?"
languages.original_text: "Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Are you sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"

traits.locale_text: "Şu hâline bak, dualarla zar zor ayakta duruyorsun. Cerraha görünmen gerekmediğinden emin misin?"

languages.text: « Regardez-vous, c'est à se demander comment vous tenez encore debout. Vous ne pensez pas qu'il vaudrait mieux aller voir un chirurgeon ? »
languages.original_text: "Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Are you sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"

traits.locale_text: « Regardez-vous, c'est à se demander comment vous tenez encore debout. Vous ne pensez pas qu'il vaudrait mieux aller voir un chirurgeon ? »

languages.text: «Mírese. Se mantiene en pie con fuerza de voluntad y plegarias. ¿Seguro que no necesita visitar a un cirujano?».
languages.original_text: "Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Are you sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"

traits.locale_text: «Mírese. Se mantiene en pie con fuerza de voluntad y plegarias. ¿Seguro que no necesita visitar a un cirujano?».

languages.text: "Seht Euch an, Ihr werdet nur durch Spucke und Gebete zusammengehalten. Seid Ihr sicher, dass Ihr keinen Chirurgeum braucht?"
languages.original_text: "Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Are you sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"

traits.locale_text: "Seht Euch an, Ihr werdet nur durch Spucke und Gebete zusammengehalten. Seid Ihr sicher, dass Ihr keinen Chirurgeum braucht?"

languages.text: 「君、唾と祈りで成り立ってるじゃないか。外科医に診てもらう必要はないのかい？」
languages.original_text: "Look at you, you're held together by spit and prayers. Are you sure you don't need a visit to a chirurgeon?"

traits.locale_text: 「君、唾と祈りで成り立ってるじゃないか。外科医に診てもらう必要はないのかい？」
